text:
Created attachment 193004
Patch updating www/quark to g20180403

Change set[1].

Port infrastructure changes:
 - Make patches smaller. MANPATH and CC could be overwritten using MAKE_ARGS as this port uses the config.mk building infrastructure popular within the suckless.org community.


[1]: https://git.suckless.org/quark/log/?id=6770dc06e69f422124d1e9c0efdefa7cc4e98b61&qt=range&q=%096770dc06e69f..%09ba38b0969f542e6e7
